test_cases.question: Through which service does Atlas reach the Knowledge Graph Team?
test_cases.ground_truth: Atlas reaches the Knowledge Graph Team through GraphStore, because Atlas depends on GraphStore and GraphStore is maintained by the Knowledge Graph Team.

test_cases.question: First Atlas depends on which service, then which product is supported by the owning team?
test_cases.ground_truth: Atlas first depends on GraphStore. The owning Knowledge Graph Team supports Fusion AIDE knowledge services.
